description_en: A traditional Chinese style table lamp with carved wooden base, central brass or wood stem, fabric/paper conical shade with bamboo wire frames, and decorative finial. Features dark mahogany or black lacquer finish with classic proportions.

components.name: base_plate
components.description: Circular wooden bottom base plate for stability
components.position_note: bottom of lamp, on table surface

components.name: base_pedestal
components.description: Decorative carved wooden block, slightly narrower than base plate

components.name: central_stem
components.description: Main vertical support pole running from base through shade to finial
components.position_note: centered on base_pedestal, rising vertically through shade

components.name: socket_cup
components.description: Ceramic or brass lamp socket holding the bulb
components.position_note: attached to central_stem at ~0.20m from bottom

components.name: shade_support
components.description: Small cylindrical collar on stem that supports the shade bottom ring

components.name: shade_bottom_ring
components.description: Bottom wire frame ring of the lampshade, bamboo or brass
components.position_note: resting on shade_support, forming shade base

components.name: shade_top_ring
components.description: Top wire frame ring of the lampshade, smaller diameter than bottom
components.position_note: at top of shade_fabric, central_stem passes through center

components.name: shade_fabric
components.description: Conical fabric or paper shade body between top and bottom rings

components.name: finial
components.description: Decorative top knob securing the shade
components.position_note: at top of central_stem, above shade_top_ring

style_notes: Traditional Chinese craftsmanship: base_pedestal features carved cloud motifs or key-fret pattern (回纹) in relief; dark mahogany wood tone or black lacquer finish with subtle sheen; shade_fabric in rice paper or silk with hand-painted bamboo or landscape motifs (surface decal, not geometry); brass or aged bronze metal fittings; proportions follow classical stability with heavy base (~30% of total height); shade tapers gently with warm off-white material; finial may feature small jade or wood sphere detail. Avoid floating geometry—ensure central_stem is continuous through shade.
